Name: eDCRule
Author: eDC ICE223 - ice223@acercsi.com
Description: The eDCRule solution for Microsoft Sentinel installs custom analytic rule templates.
WorkbookBladeDescription: This solution does not include workbooks.
AnalyticalRuleBladeDescription: This solution installs analytic rule templates. After installing the solution, create and enable analytic rules in the Manage solution view.
HuntingQueryBladeDescription: This solution does not include hunting queries.
PlaybooksBladeDescription: This solution does not include playbook templates.
Analytic Rules: Analytic Rules/[AzureSubscription] Suspicious Azure VM Run Command Execution Detected.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Application Assigned Administrator Permissions Immediately After Obtaining Role Management Permissions.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Application Granted Administrative Permission to Assign Microsoft Entra ID Roles.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Authentication Method Changed for Privileged Account.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Domain Federation Trust Settings Modified.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Mass Privileged Role Change Activity Detected.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Privilege Elevation Request Denied.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Privileged Role Assigned to a New User.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Privileged Role Assigned to User.yaml
Analytic Rules/[Entra ID] Suspicious Continuous OAuth Token Usage.yaml
